title: paracostus englerianus
intro: Paracostus englerianus, also known as the African potato, is a type of plant that belongs to the Costaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Paracostus englerianus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, as well as its potential to protect against certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat skin conditions.
